description: ATTOM provides U.S. real-estate and property data, including property, neighborhood, boundary, valuation, and market datasets. Its products are delivered through APIs, bulk/cloud data access, and related data platforms.
summary: ATTOM exposes a documented HTTP Property Data API that requires an ATTOM-issued API key; its site also advertises an MCP Server, but no public connect endpoint or authentication mechanics were discoverable from the surfaced docs.
